caption: In an animated scene, a man with dark hair and a blue shirt enters a room through a doorway. A bright green circle highlights the man's head as he moves forward. A white speech bubble appears beneath him, which initially is blank but then displays the text "Rick Segall" in a stylized black font. Below the name, a small green button appears with the text "Old" written in white. As the man continues to walk into the room, a soft blue glow emanates from his chest and face, illuminating his features. The background is a simple interior with neutral-colored walls, decorated with floating colorful geometric shapes, including small stars, triangles, and pentagons, which drift across the scene as the man advances.
